titles.title: Standing In the Need of Prayer

authors.author: Spiritual
Spiritual
Ich bin's, ich bin's, ich bin's o Gott

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It’s me, it’s me Oh Lord! Standing in the need of prayer (x2) Not my mother not my father but its me Oh Lord! Standing in the need of prayer, it’s me, it’s me, Oh Lord! Standing in the need of prayer.
